name: Jack O'lantern Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:25
1. Heat oven to 350°F.
2. Line 24 muffin cups with paper baking cups.
3. In a large bowl, combine all cupcake ingredients at low speed until moistened. Beat for 2 minutes at medium speed, scraping down the sides of the bowl.
4. Pour batter into prepared muffin cups.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool completely.
7. In a small bowl, beat margarine and 3 tablespoons pumpkin until well blended.
8. Gradually add 1 cup powdered sugar; beat until smooth, about 1 minute.
9. Add milk and vanilla. Beat for an additional 2 minutes.
10. Spread frosting on tops of cupcakes.
11. Cut the black licorice twist into triangular pieces to form eyes and noses.
12. Cut jagged curved pieces for mouths.
13. Arrange gumdrops in half on top of cupcakes as stems.
